title: DE L'ANALYSE DES BESOINS LANGAGIERS AUX OBJECTIFS DE FORMATION EN « BIOLOGIE »
author: Mohamed Fouzi Imessaoudene
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Our contribution is inspired from French for Specific Purposes method, so we have followed its main steps namely: request / offer, analysis of learning needs, data collection and analysis, and finally proposal of educational sequences. Noting that we focused on a student audience registered in a biologic sector which has an Arabic-speaking profile and who is enrolled in a biologic sector where knowledge is transmitted in French.
steps_raw: Our contribution is inspired from French for Specific Purposes method, so we have followed its main steps namely: request / offer, analysis of learning needs, data collection and analysis, and finally proposal of educational sequences. Noting that we focused on a student audience registered in a biologic sector which has an Arabic-speaking profile and who is enrolled in a biologic sector where knowledge is transmitted in French.
keywords: French for Specific Purposes needs analysis, data collection and analysis, educational development, biological sciences.
